description: Automated heuristic file scanner and harvester designed to identify, compress (zlib), and encrypt (AES-256-CTR) sensitive data (credentials, configs, DBs, clinical PII) directly into a monolithic binary blob for secure staging.

capabilities: Heuristic file classification based on extensions, names, and path patterns
Dynamic exclusion of noisy/system directories (e.g., /bin, /sys, node_modules)
On-the-fly streaming AES-256-CTR encryption (if cryptography lib present) to avoid plaintext staging
Zlib compression per-file to reduce exfiltration footprint
Monolithic custom binary blob format (SIG5 magic header)
evasion_techniques: In-memory classification and staging process without intermediate cleartext files
Output blending strategy (e.g., saving blob as hidden cache file in /tmp/)
Graceful degradation (falls back to unencrypted blob if crypto libs are missing)

output_files.name: [output_path]
output_files.description: The custom binary blob containing staged, compressed, and encrypted files

output_files.name: [output_path].manifest.json
output_files.description: JSON summary mapping offsets and hashes of collected files within the blob

detection_opportunities: High volume of file read operations across multiple directories in a short timeframe
Creation of large unknown binaries in temporary or hidden locations
Execution of python processes consuming significant CPU for encryption/compression
High disk I/O operations from an unprivileged process traversing user directories
